adversarial.description: Independent full re-execution of all 12 contract-051 entries at deliverable commit 68832c9 -- 12/12 exit 0 (.agent/evidence/051/verification.txt). The adversarial core: E05 reconstructs the REAL consumer path (bootstrap a genuine enlarged payload, run --payload from both the payload root and the consumer repo root, then STRIP methodology/+ecosystem/ and confirm BOTH validate.sh and bootstrap --verify-only reject the stripped payload) -- proving the injection is load-bearing, not cosmetic; E12 proves the negative half of the contract (registry/+docs/ stay OUT of a real payload, which still passes); E01 anchors anti-vacuity to the F-050 merge base; E06 confirms the authoritative GIP contract is internally consistent (C10) after all six enumeration sites were updated; E10 confirms default mode is unchanged. All probes used session-scratch paths and bootstrap-injected scratch payloads exclusively (NDEBT-013/020 probe-isolation); no destructive command touched a real repository path.
adversarial.process_note: Single-session execution, roles collapsed (disclosed in contract 051 design_notes). Verification commands are fail-fast (NDEBT-019 lesson practiced).

evidence_bundle_check.diff_patch_reasoning: diff of .agent/evidence/051/diff.patch against a freshly generated git diff HEAD~1..HEAD produced zero bytes of difference at QA time.
evidence_bundle_check.flat_files: All 12 flat captures end with a literal [exit 0] line and open with the exact contract command; the consolidated verification.txt carries 12 EXIT:0 markers in contract order.

acceptance_reconciliation.source: .agent/feature_list_006.json feature 051 (status flipped by the orchestrator at close-out)
acceptance_reconciliation.summary: F-051's planner acceptance tests map onto the suite: bootstrap injects methodology/+ecosystem/ -> E02/E05; consumer payload resolves them (both --payload forms) -> E05; the payload enumerations (GIP/README/CONTEXT) update together -> E06; the C4/C9/C13 carve-outs retire for the injected dirs -> E07; the e2e asserts the enlarged payload -> E08; NDEBT-008 resolved -> E09. registry/docs stay out -> E12. No criterion lacks a passing, evidence-backed entry.

non_blocking_observations: Scope: 155 actual lines (git numstat ins+del) vs the 200 planner estimate -- UNDER estimate, no flag. Cumulative phase-006 513/2236 ceiling (22.9%).

Consumer impact (by design, not a defect): existing consumers receive methodology/+ecosystem/ only on their next re-bootstrap (GIP Section 4 remediation: re-run bootstrap.sh against a newer tag); until then their older payload predates the enlarged contract. This is the intended adoption path for a payload-contract change and ships in the next release (v0.8.0, F-059).
The H-PAYLOAD-CONTRACT gate was ratified by the operator's PR #29 merge and the explicit 'Feature 051 now' answer; NDEBT-004's ratification caveat is now closed (DEBT 0.21.0).

final_verdict.summary: PASS. Feature 051 implements the operator's H-PAYLOAD-CONTRACT decision at deliverable commit 68832c9: methodology/ and ecosystem/ now join the bootstrap-injected payload across all coupled surfaces (bootstrap.sh, the GIP 0.4.0 authoritative contract + CONTEXT 0.7.0 enumerations, the C4/C9/C13 payload carve-outs narrowed to {registry, docs}, and the e2e enlarged-payload assertions). Proven load-bearing: the enlarged payload passes --payload both forms (11/11); a stripped payload FAILs both validate.sh and bootstrap --verify-only; registry/+docs/ stay out; framework self-sweeps unchanged (13/13 default, 11/11 payload); e2e green. NDEBT-008 -> Resolved; NDEBT-004 ratified (DEBT 0.21.0). Deliverable diff confined to the seven contracted files, zero tracked .agent changes. 155 lines vs 200 estimated (under).
